SOD compiled figure and tables–relative abundance

2024-06-11

knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
knitr::opts_knit$set(root.dir = "~/SOD_Microbiome")

library(phyloseq); packageVersion("phyloseq")
## [1] '1.50.0'
library(ggplot2); packageVersion("ggplot2")
## [1] '4.0.0'

## [1] '1.3.1'
set.seed(1)

Compiled analysis

prepare_phyloseq <- function(ps, rank = "Phylum", group_var,
                             reference_level = NULL, min_prop = 0.01) {
  
  ps_agg <- tax_glom(ps, taxrank = rank, NArm = TRUE) 
  
  ps_rel <- transform_sample_counts(ps_agg, function(x) x / sum(x))

  original_tax_names <- as.character(tax_table(ps_rel)[, rank])
  
  tax_table(ps_rel)[, rank] <- original_tax_names
  
  df_temp <- psmelt(ps_rel) %>%
    group_by(across(all_of(c(group_var, rank)))) %>%
    summarise(Mean_Abund = mean(Abundance), .groups = "drop") %>%
    group_by(across(all_of(group_var))) %>%
    mutate(Prop = Mean_Abund / sum(Mean_Abund)) %>%
    ungroup()
  
  keep_taxa_names <- df_temp %>%
    filter(Prop >= min_prop) %>%
    pull(!!sym(rank)) %>%
    unique()
  
  if (length(keep_taxa_names) == 0 || min_prop == 0) {
    keep_taxa_names <- unique(original_tax_names)
  }
  
  keep_indices <- which(original_tax_names %in% keep_taxa_names)
  
  ps_filt <- prune_taxa(taxa_names(ps_rel)[keep_indices], ps_rel)
  
  if (!is.null(reference_level) && reference_level %in% sample_data(ps_filt)[[group_var]]) {

    current_tax_names <- as.character(tax_table(ps_filt)[, rank])
    
    ref_props <- df_temp %>%
      filter(.data[[group_var]] == reference_level, 
             .data[[rank]] %in% keep_taxa_names) %>%
      arrange(Prop) %>%
      select(all_of(rank), Prop)
    
    if (nrow(ref_props) > 0) {
      ref_taxa_ordered <- ref_props[[rank]]
      other_taxa <- setdiff(keep_taxa_names, ref_taxa_ordered)
      taxa_order <- c(other_taxa, ref_taxa_ordered)
      otu_order <- character()
      for (taxon in taxa_order) {
        matching_otus <- taxa_names(ps_filt)[which(current_tax_names == taxon)]
        otu_order <- c(otu_order, matching_otus)
      }
      
      otu_order <- unique(otu_order[!is.na(otu_order)])
      if (length(otu_order) > 0 && length(otu_order) == ntaxa(ps_filt)) {
        ps_filt <- prune_taxa(otu_order, ps_filt)
      }
    }
  }
  
  return(ps_filt)
}

export_genus_data <- function(ps, group_var, output_file, rank = "Genus") {
  
  ps_agg <- tax_glom(ps, taxrank = rank, NArm = TRUE)
  ps_rel <- transform_sample_counts(ps_agg, function(x) x / sum(x))
  
  all_ranks <- c("Kingdom", "Phylum", "Class", "Order", "Family", "Genus", "Species")
  
  available_ranks <- colnames(tax_table(ps_rel))
  
  rank_index <- which(all_ranks == rank)
  ranks_to_include <- all_ranks[1:rank_index]
  
  ranks_to_include <- ranks_to_include[ranks_to_include %in% available_ranks]
  
  if (length(ranks_to_include) == 0) {
    ranks_to_include <- rank
  }
  
  data_summary <- psmelt(ps_rel) %>%
    group_by(across(all_of(c(group_var, ranks_to_include)))) %>%
    summarise(
      Mean_RelAbund = mean(Abundance),
      SD_RelAbund = sd(Abundance),
      N_Samples = n(),
      .groups = "drop"
    ) %>%
    group_by(across(all_of(group_var))) %>%
    mutate(Mean_Relative_Abundance = Mean_RelAbund / sum(Mean_RelAbund)) %>%
    ungroup() %>%
    arrange(across(all_of(group_var)), desc(Mean_Relative_Abundance))
  
  write.csv(data_summary, output_file, row.names = FALSE)
  message("✓ Data exported to: ", output_file)
  message("  Taxonomic ranks included: ", paste(ranks_to_include, collapse = ", "))
  
  return(data_summary)
}

create_relabund_plot <- function(ps, rank = "Phylum", group_var,
                                 reference_level = NULL,
                                 min_prop = 0.01,
                                 collapse_other = TRUE,
                                 other_label = "Other",
                                 output_file = NULL,
                                 output_data_file = NULL,
                                 width = 7.5, height = 8.5, dpi = 300) {
  
  ps_ready <- prepare_phyloseq(ps, rank = rank, group_var = group_var,
                               reference_level = reference_level,
                               min_prop = 0)
  
  df_plot <- psmelt(ps_ready)
  
  if (!rank %in% colnames(df_plot)) {
    stop(paste("Rank", rank, "not found in phyloseq object. Available columns:", 
               paste(colnames(df_plot), collapse = ", ")))
  }
  
  all_ranks <- c("Kingdom", "Phylum", "Class", "Order", "Family", "Genus", "Species")
  
  available_ranks <- colnames(df_plot)
  
  rank_index <- which(all_ranks == rank)
  ranks_to_include <- all_ranks[1:rank_index]
  
  ranks_to_include <- ranks_to_include[ranks_to_include %in% available_ranks]
  
  if (length(ranks_to_include) == 0) {
    ranks_to_include <- rank
  }
  
  df_detailed <- df_plot %>%
    group_by(across(all_of(c(group_var, ranks_to_include)))) %>%
    summarise(
      Mean_Relative_Abundance = mean(Abundance, na.rm = TRUE),
      Standard_Deviation = sd(Abundance, na.rm = TRUE),
      Standard_Error = if_else(n() > 1, sd(Abundance, na.rm = TRUE) / sqrt(n()), NA_real_),
      Sample_Size = n(),
      Prevalence_Percent = (sum(Abundance > 0, na.rm = TRUE) / n()) * 100,
      .groups = "drop"
    ) %>%
    filter(!is.nan(Mean_Relative_Abundance))
  
  df_summary <- df_detailed %>%
    select(all_of(c(group_var, rank, "Mean_Relative_Abundance")))
  
  names(df_summary)[names(df_summary) == "Mean_Relative_Abundance"] <- "Abundance"
  
  ranks_in_detailed <- ranks_to_include[ranks_to_include %in% colnames(df_detailed)]
  
  if (collapse_other) {
    df_detailed_precollapse <- df_detailed
    
    df_summary <- df_summary %>%
      group_by(across(all_of(group_var))) %>%
      mutate(prop = Abundance / sum(Abundance),
             !!rank := if_else(prop < min_prop, other_label, .data[[rank]])) %>%
      group_by(across(all_of(c(group_var, rank)))) %>%
      summarise(Abundance = sum(Abundance), .groups = "drop")

    df_detailed <- df_detailed %>%
      group_by(across(all_of(group_var))) %>%
      mutate(prop = Mean_Relative_Abundance / sum(Mean_Relative_Abundance),
             is_other = prop < min_prop) %>%
      ungroup()
    
    for (tax_rank in ranks_in_detailed) {
      df_detailed <- df_detailed %>%
        mutate(!!tax_rank := if_else(is_other, other_label, .data[[tax_rank]]))
    }
    
    df_detailed <- df_detailed %>%
      group_by(across(all_of(c(group_var, ranks_in_detailed)))) %>%
      summarise(
        Mean_Relative_Abundance = sum(Mean_Relative_Abundance, na.rm = TRUE),
        Standard_Deviation = sqrt(sum(Standard_Deviation^2, na.rm = TRUE)),
        Sample_Size = sum(Sample_Size, na.rm = TRUE),
        Standard_Error = if_else(Sample_Size[1] > 1, Standard_Deviation / sqrt(Sample_Size[1]), NA_real_),
        N_with_taxon = sum(Prevalence_Percent * Sample_Size / 100, na.rm = TRUE),
        .groups = "drop"
      ) %>%
      mutate(
        Prevalence_Percent = (N_with_taxon / Sample_Size) * 100
      ) %>%
      select(-N_with_taxon) %>%
      mutate(
        Standard_Deviation = if_else(.data[[rank]] == other_label, NA_real_, Standard_Deviation),
        Standard_Error = if_else(.data[[rank]] == other_label, NA_real_, Standard_Error),
        Sample_Size = if_else(.data[[rank]] == other_label, NA_real_, Sample_Size),
        Prevalence_Percent = if_else(.data[[rank]] == other_label, NA_real_, Prevalence_Percent)
      )
  }
  
  taxa_names <- unique(df_summary[[rank]])
  
  if (!is.null(reference_level)) {
    ref_taxa <- df_summary %>%
      filter(.data[[group_var]] == reference_level) %>%
      arrange(Abundance) %>%
      pull(!!sym(rank)) %>%
      unique()
    
    taxa_order <- unique(c(setdiff(taxa_names, c(ref_taxa, other_label)), ref_taxa))
    if (other_label %in% taxa_names) {
      taxa_order <- unique(c(taxa_order, other_label))
    }
  } else {
    taxa_order <- df_summary %>%
      group_by(.data[[rank]]) %>%
      summarise(total = sum(Abundance), .groups = "drop") %>%
      arrange(total) %>%
      pull(.data[[rank]]) %>%
      unique()
  }
  
  taxa_order <- unique(taxa_order)
  
  df_summary[[rank]] <- factor(df_summary[[rank]], levels = taxa_order)
  
  n_taxa <- length(unique(df_summary[[rank]]))
  legend_ncol <- if (rank == "Genus" && n_taxa > 12) 6 else 4
  legend_size <- if (rank == "Genus" && n_taxa > 15) 7 else 9
  
  p <- ggplot(df_summary, aes(x = .data[[group_var]], y = Abundance, fill = .data[[rank]])) +
    geom_col(color = "black", linewidth = 0.2) +
    scale_fill_viridis_d(option = "H", direction = -1) +
    scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::percent_format(accuracy = 1), limits = c(0, 1)) +
    labs(y = "Relative Abundance (%)", x = NULL, fill = rank) +
    theme_minimal() +
    theme(
      axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, vjust = 0.5, size = 10),
      legend.position = "top",
      legend.text = element_text(size = legend_size)
    ) +
    guides(fill = guide_legend(reverse = TRUE, ncol = legend_ncol))
  
  if (!is.null(output_file)) {
    ggsave(output_file, p, width = width, height = height, dpi = dpi)
  }
  
  data_summary <- df_detailed %>%
    arrange(across(all_of(group_var)), desc(Mean_Relative_Abundance))

  stat_cols <- c("Mean_Relative_Abundance", "Standard_Deviation", "Standard_Error", 
                 "Sample_Size", "Prevalence_Percent")
  col_order <- c(group_var, ranks_in_detailed, stat_cols)
  data_summary <- data_summary %>% select(all_of(col_order))
  
  if (!is.null(output_data_file)) {
    write.csv(data_summary, output_data_file, row.names = FALSE)
    message("✓ Data exported to: ", output_data_file)
    message("  Taxonomic ranks included: ", paste(ranks_in_detailed, collapse = ", "))
  }
  
  return(list(plot = p, data = data_summary, ps = ps_ready))
}

16S analysis

load("Data/16S/filtered_data/sod_5asv_nowildfire.RData")
sod_5asv_16S_nowf.ps <- sod_5asv_nowildfire.ps

sod_5asv_16S_nowf.ps@sam_data$Treatuntreat_EP <- factor(
  sod_5asv_16S_nowf.ps@sam_data$Treatuntreat_EP, 
  levels = c("untreated", "treated"),
  labels = c("SOD-UT", "SOD-T")
)

sod_5asv_16S_nowf.ps@sam_data$YrSinceTrt_BR <- factor(
  sod_5asv_16S_nowf.ps@sam_data$YrSinceTrt_BR,
  levels = c("untreated", "1to2", "3to4", "5to8", "10to12"),
  labels = c("SOD-UT", "1-2 PT", "3-4 PT", "5-8 PT", "10-12 PT")
)

result_16S_trt <- create_relabund_plot(
  ps = sod_5asv_16S_nowf.ps,
  rank = "Phylum",
  group_var = "Treatuntreat_EP",
  reference_level = "SOD-UT",
  min_prop = 0.01,
  output_file = "Figures/16S/relabundance_plot_16S_treatment_phylum_nowildfire.pdf"
)

write.csv(result_16S_trt$data, 
          "Results/16S/relabundance_table_16S_treatment_phylum_nowildfire.csv",
          row.names = FALSE)

result_16S_trt_genus <- create_relabund_plot(
  ps = sod_5asv_16S_nowf.ps,
  rank = "Genus",
  group_var = "Treatuntreat_EP",
  reference_level = "SOD-UT",
  min_prop = 0.01,
  output_file = "Figures/16S/relabundance_plot_16S_treatment_genus_nowildfire.pdf"
)

write.csv(result_16S_trt_genus$data, 
          "Results/16S/relabundance_table_16S_treatment_genus_nowildfire.csv",
          row.names = FALSE)

result_16S_yrs <- create_relabund_plot(
  ps = sod_5asv_16S_nowf.ps,
  rank = "Phylum",
  group_var = "YrSinceTrt_BR",
  reference_level = "SOD-UT",
  min_prop = 0.01,
  output_file = "Figures/16S/relabundance_plot_16S_YrSinceTrtBR_phylum_nowildfire.pdf"
)

write.csv(result_16S_yrs$data,
          "Results/16S/relabundance_table_16S_YrSinceTrtBR_phylum_nowildfire.csv",
          row.names = FALSE)


result_16S_yrs_genus <- create_relabund_plot(
  ps = sod_5asv_16S_nowf.ps,
  rank = "Genus",
  group_var = "YrSinceTrt_BR",
  reference_level = "SOD-UT",
  min_prop = 0.01,
  output_file = "Figures/16S/relabundance_plot_16S_YrSinceTrtBR_genus_nowildfire.pdf"
)
## Warning: Removed 1 row containing missing values or values outside the scale range
## (`geom_col()`).
write.csv(result_16S_yrs_genus$data, 
          "Results/16S/relabundance_table_16S_YrSinceTrtBR_genus_nowildfire.csv",
          row.names = FALSE)


load("Data/16S/filtered_data/sod_5asv.RData")
sod_5asv_16S.ps <- sod_5asv.ps

sod_5asv_16S.ps@sam_data$Fire_Mod <- factor(
  sod_5asv_16S.ps@sam_data$Fire_Mod,
  levels = c("untreated", "SODtrt", "wildfire"),
  labels = c("SOD-UT", "SOD-T", "Wildfire")
)

result_16S_fire <- create_relabund_plot(
  ps = sod_5asv_16S.ps,
  rank = "Phylum",
  group_var = "Fire_Mod",
  reference_level = "SOD-UT",
  min_prop = 0.01,
  output_file = "Figures/16S/relabundance_plot_16S_fire_phylum.pdf"
)

write.csv(result_16S_fire$data, 
          "Results/16S/relabundance_table_16S_fire_phylum.csv",
          row.names = FALSE)

result_16S_fire_genus <- create_relabund_plot(
  ps = sod_5asv_16S.ps,
  rank = "Genus",
  group_var = "Fire_Mod",
  reference_level = "SOD-UT",
  min_prop = 0.01,
  output_file = "Figures/16S/relabundance_plot_16S_fire_genus.pdf"
)
## Warning: Removed 1 row containing missing values or values outside the scale range
## (`geom_col()`).
write.csv(result_16S_fire_genus$data, 
          "Results/16S/relabundance_table_16S_fire_genus.csv",
          row.names = FALSE)

ITS analysis

load("Data/ITS/filtered_data/sod_5asv_nowildfire.RData")
sod_5asv_ITS_nowf.ps <- sod_5asv_nowildfire.ps

sod_5asv_ITS_nowf.ps@sam_data$Treatuntreat_EP <- factor(
  sod_5asv_ITS_nowf.ps@sam_data$Treatuntreat_EP, 
  levels = c("untreated", "treated"),
  labels = c("SOD-UT", "SOD-T")
)

sod_5asv_ITS_nowf.ps@sam_data$YrSinceTrt_BR <- factor(
  sod_5asv_ITS_nowf.ps@sam_data$YrSinceTrt_BR,
  levels = c("untreated", "1to2", "3to4", "5to8", "10to12"),
  labels = c("SOD-UT", "1-2 PT", "3-4 PT", "5-8 PT", "10-12 PT")
)

result_ITS_trt <- create_relabund_plot(
  ps = sod_5asv_ITS_nowf.ps,
  rank = "Phylum",
  group_var = "Treatuntreat_EP",
  reference_level = "SOD-UT",
  min_prop = 0.01,
  output_file = "Figures/ITS/relabundance_plot_ITS_treatment_phylum_nowildfire.pdf"
)

write.csv(result_ITS_trt$data, 
          "Results/ITS/relabundance_table_ITS_treatment_phylum_nowildfire.csv",
          row.names = FALSE)

result_ITS_trt_genus <- create_relabund_plot(
  ps = sod_5asv_ITS_nowf.ps,
  rank = "Genus",
  group_var = "Treatuntreat_EP",
  reference_level = "SOD-UT",
  min_prop = 0.01,
  output_file = "Figures/ITS/relabundance_plot_ITS_treatment_genus_nowildfire.pdf"
)

write.csv(result_ITS_trt_genus$data, 
          "Results/ITS/relabundance_table_ITS_treatment_genus_nowildfire.csv",
          row.names = FALSE)

result_ITS_yrs <- create_relabund_plot(
  ps = sod_5asv_ITS_nowf.ps,
  rank = "Phylum",
  group_var = "YrSinceTrt_BR",
  reference_level = "SOD-UT",
  min_prop = 0.01,
  output_file = "Figures/ITS/relabundance_plot_ITS_YrSinceTrtBR_phylum_nowildfire.pdf"
)

write.csv(result_ITS_yrs$data,
          "Results/ITS/relabundance_table_ITS_YrSinceTrtBR_phylum_nowildfire.csv",
          row.names = FALSE)


result_ITS_yrs_genus <- create_relabund_plot(
  ps = sod_5asv_ITS_nowf.ps,
  rank = "Genus",
  group_var = "YrSinceTrt_BR",
  reference_level = "SOD-UT",
  min_prop = 0.01,
  output_file = "Figures/ITS/relabundance_plot_ITS_YrSinceTrtBR_genus_nowildfire.pdf"
)
## Warning: Removed 1 row containing missing values or values outside the scale range
## (`geom_col()`).
write.csv(result_ITS_yrs_genus$data, 
          "Results/ITS/relabundance_table_ITS_YrSinceTrtBR_genus_nowildfire.csv",
          row.names = FALSE)


load("Data/ITS/filtered_data/sod_5asv.RData")
sod_5asv_ITS.ps <- sod_5asv.ps

sod_5asv_ITS.ps@sam_data$Fire_Mod <- factor(
  sod_5asv_ITS.ps@sam_data$Fire_Mod,
  levels = c("untreated", "SODtrt", "wildfire"),
  labels = c("SOD-UT", "SOD-T", "Wildfire")
)

result_ITS_fire <- create_relabund_plot(
  ps = sod_5asv_ITS.ps,
  rank = "Phylum",
  group_var = "Fire_Mod",
  reference_level = "SOD-UT",
  min_prop = 0.01,
  output_file = "Figures/ITS/relabundance_plot_ITS_fire_phylum.pdf"
)

write.csv(result_ITS_fire$data, 
          "Results/ITS/relabundance_table_ITS_fire_phylum.csv",
          row.names = FALSE)

result_ITS_fire_genus <- create_relabund_plot(
  ps = sod_5asv_ITS.ps,
  rank = "Genus",
  group_var = "Fire_Mod",
  reference_level = "SOD-UT",
  min_prop = 0.01,
  output_file = "Figures/ITS/relabundance_plot_ITS_fire_genus.pdf"
)

write.csv(result_ITS_fire_genus$data, 
          "Results/ITS/relabundance_table_ITS_fire_genus.csv",
          row.names = FALSE)

RPS10 analysis

load("Data/RPS10/filtered_data/sod_5asv_nowildfire.RData")
sod_5asv_rps10_nowf.ps <- sod_5asv_nowildfire.ps

sod_5asv_rps10_nowf.ps@sam_data$Treatuntreat_EP <- factor(
  sod_5asv_rps10_nowf.ps@sam_data$Treatuntreat_EP, 
  levels = c("untreated", "treated"),
  labels = c("SOD-UT", "SOD-T")
)

sod_5asv_rps10_nowf.ps@sam_data$YrSinceTrt_BR <- factor(
  sod_5asv_rps10_nowf.ps@sam_data$YrSinceTrt_BR,
  levels = c("untreated", "1to2", "3to4", "5to8", "10to12"),
  labels = c("SOD-UT", "1-2 PT", "3-4 PT", "5-8 PT", "10-12 PT")
)

# Phylum plots

  ps = sod_5asv_rps10_nowf.ps,
  rank = "Phylum",
  group_var = "Treatuntreat_EP",
  reference_level = "SOD-UT",
  min_prop = 0.01,
  output_file = "Figures/RPS10/relabundance_plot_RPS10_treatment_phylum_nowildfire.pdf"
)

          "Results/RPS10/relabundance_table_RPS10_treatment_phylum_nowildfire.csv",
          row.names = FALSE)

  ps = sod_5asv_rps10_nowf.ps,
  rank = "Phylum",
  group_var = "YrSinceTrt_BR",
  reference_level = "SOD-UT",
  min_prop = 0.01,
  output_file = "Figures/RPS10/relabundance_plot_RPS10_YrSinceTrtBR_phylum_nowildfire.pdf"
)

## (`geom_col()`).

## 
## $data
## # A tibble: 28 × 12
##    Fire_Mod Kingdom      Phylum  Class Order Family Genus Mean_Relative_Abunda…¹
##    <fct>    <chr>        <chr>   <chr> <chr> <chr>  <chr>                  <dbl>
##  1 SOD-UT   Stramenopila Oomyco… Oomy… Pyth… Pythi… Glob…                 0.363 
##  2 SOD-UT   Stramenopila Oomyco… Oomy… Pyth… Pythi… Pyth…                 0.146 
##  3 SOD-UT   Stramenopila Oomyco… Oomy… Pyth… Pythi… Phyt…                 0.120 
##  4 SOD-UT   Stramenopila Oomyco… Oomy… Sapr… Sapro… Achl…                 0.117 
##  5 SOD-UT   Stramenopila Oomyco… Oomy… Pero… Peron… Phyt…                 0.0642
##  6 SOD-UT   Stramenopila Oomyco… Oomy… Sapr… Sapro… Sapr…                 0.0529
##  7 SOD-UT   Stramenopila Oomyco… Oomy… Pyth… Pythi… Halo…                 0.0428
##  8 SOD-UT   Stramenopila Oomyco… Oomy… Lage… Lagen… Lage…                 0.0415
##  9 SOD-UT   Stramenopila Oomyco… Oomy… Pyth… Pythi… Elon…                 0.0252
## 10 SOD-UT   Stramenopila Oomyco… Oomy… Sapr… Lepto… Apha…                 0.0244
## # ℹ 18 more rows
## # ℹ abbreviated name: ¹​Mean_Relative_Abundance
## # ℹ 4 more variables: Standard_Deviation <dbl>, Standard_Error <dbl>,
## #   Sample_Size <dbl>, Prevalence_Percent <dbl>
## 
## $ps
## phyloseq-class experiment-level object
## otu_table()   OTU Table:         [ 22 taxa and 87 samples ]
## sample_data() Sample Data:       [ 87 samples by 25 sample variables ]
## tax_table()   Taxonomy Table:    [ 22 taxa by 16 taxonomic ranks ]
## refseq()      DNAStringSet:      [ 22 reference sequences ]
write.csv(result_RPS10_fire_genus$data, 
          "Results/RPS10/relabundance_table_RPS10_fire_genus.csv",
          row.names = FALSE)

result_RPS10_fire_species <- create_relabund_plot(
  ps = sod_5asv_rps10.ps,
  rank = "Species",
  group_var = "Fire_Mod",
  reference_level = "SOD-UT",
  min_prop = 0.01,
  output_file = "Figures/RPS10/relabundance_plot_RPS10_fire_species.pdf"
)

## $data
## # A tibble: 58 × 13
##    Fire_Mod Kingdom      Phylum   Class     Order          Family  Genus Species
##    <fct>    <chr>        <chr>    <chr>     <chr>          <chr>   <chr> <chr>  
##  1 SOD-UT   Stramenopila Oomycota Oomycetes Pythiales      Pythia… Glob… Globis…
##  2 SOD-UT   Stramenopila Oomycota Oomycetes Pythiales      Pythia… Glob… Globis…
##  3 SOD-UT   Stramenopila Oomycota Oomycetes Saprolegniales Saprol… Achl… Achlya…
##  4 SOD-UT   Other        Other    Other     Other          Other   Other Other  
##  5 SOD-UT   Stramenopila Oomycota Oomycetes Pythiales      Pythia… Phyt… Phytop…
##  6 SOD-UT   Stramenopila Oomycota Oomycetes Peronosporales Perono… Phyt… Phytop…
##  7 SOD-UT   Stramenopila Oomycota Oomycetes Pythiales      Pythia… Pyth… Pythiu…
##  8 SOD-UT   Stramenopila Oomycota Oomycetes Saprolegniales Saprol… Sapr… Saprol…
##  9 SOD-UT   Stramenopila Oomycota Oomycetes Pythiales      Pythia… Halo… Haloph…
## 10 SOD-UT   Stramenopila Oomycota Oomycetes Lagenidiales   Lageni… Lage… Lageni…
## # ℹ 48 more rows
## # ℹ 5 more variables: Mean_Relative_Abundance <dbl>, Standard_Deviation <dbl>,
## #   Standard_Error <dbl>, Sample_Size <dbl>, Prevalence_Percent <dbl>
## 
## $ps
## phyloseq-class experiment-level object
## otu_table()   OTU Table:         [ 112 taxa and 87 samples ]
## sample_data() Sample Data:       [ 87 samples by 25 sample variables ]
## tax_table()   Taxonomy Table:    [ 112 taxa by 16 taxonomic ranks ]
## refseq()      DNAStringSet:      [ 112 reference sequences ]
write.csv(result_RPS10_fire_species$data, 
          "Results/RPS10/relabundance_table_RPS10_fire_species.csv",
          row.names = FALSE)

Combined plot

combined_df <- dplyr::bind_rows(
  result_16S_trt$data %>%
    dplyr::mutate(Factor = Treatuntreat_EP, Barcode = "16S") %>%
    dplyr::select(Factor, Phylum, Mean_Relative_Abundance, Barcode) %>%
    dplyr::mutate(Dataset = "SOD Treatment"),

  result_16S_yrs$data %>%
    dplyr::mutate(Factor = YrSinceTrt_BR, Barcode = "16S") %>%
    dplyr::select(Factor, Phylum, Mean_Relative_Abundance, Barcode) %>%
    dplyr::mutate(Dataset = "Years Since SOD Treatment"),

  result_16S_fire$data %>%
    dplyr::mutate(Factor = Fire_Mod, Barcode = "16S") %>%
    dplyr::select(Factor, Phylum, Mean_Relative_Abundance, Barcode) %>%
    dplyr::mutate(Dataset = "Chetco Bar Fire"),

  result_ITS_trt$data %>%
    dplyr::mutate(Factor = Treatuntreat_EP, Barcode = "ITS") %>%
    dplyr::select(Factor, Phylum, Mean_Relative_Abundance, Barcode) %>%
    dplyr::mutate(Dataset = "SOD Treatment"),

  result_ITS_yrs$data %>%
    dplyr::mutate(Factor = YrSinceTrt_BR, Barcode = "ITS") %>%
    dplyr::select(Factor, Phylum, Mean_Relative_Abundance, Barcode) %>%
    dplyr::mutate(Dataset = "Years Since SOD Treatment"),

  result_ITS_fire$data %>%
    dplyr::mutate(Factor = Fire_Mod, Barcode = "ITS") %>%
    dplyr::select(Factor, Phylum, Mean_Relative_Abundance, Barcode) %>%
    dplyr::mutate(Dataset = "Chetco Bar Fire"),

  result_RPS10_trt_genus$data %>%
    dplyr::mutate(Factor = Treatuntreat_EP, Barcode = "rps10") %>%
    dplyr::select(Factor, Genus, Mean_Relative_Abundance, Barcode) %>%
    dplyr::mutate(Dataset = "SOD Treatment"),

  result_RPS10_yrs_genus$data %>%
    dplyr::mutate(Factor = YrSinceTrt_BR, Barcode = "rps10") %>%
    dplyr::select(Factor, Genus, Mean_Relative_Abundance, Barcode) %>%
    dplyr::mutate(Dataset = "Years Since SOD Treatment"),

  result_RPS10_fire_genus$data %>%
    dplyr::mutate(Factor = Fire_Mod, Barcode = "rps10") %>%
    dplyr::select(Factor, Genus, Mean_Relative_Abundance, Barcode) %>%
    dplyr::mutate(Dataset = "Chetco Bar Fire")
)


combined_16S   <- combined_df %>% dplyr::filter(Barcode == "16S")
combined_ITS   <- combined_df %>% dplyr::filter(Barcode == "ITS")
combined_rps10 <- combined_df %>% dplyr::filter(Barcode == "rps10")

combined_16S$Phylum  <- as.character(combined_16S$Phylum)
combined_ITS$Phylum  <- as.character(combined_ITS$Phylum)
combined_rps10$Genus <- as.character(combined_rps10$Genus)

combined_16S$Phylum  <- trimws(combined_16S$Phylum)
combined_ITS$Phylum  <- trimws(combined_ITS$Phylum)
combined_rps10$Genus <- trimws(combined_rps10$Genus)

combined_16S$Phylum [tolower(combined_16S$Phylum)  %in% c("other","others")] <- "Other"
combined_ITS$Phylum [tolower(combined_ITS$Phylum)  %in% c("other","others")] <- "Other"
combined_rps10$Genus[tolower(combined_rps10$Genus) %in% c("other","others")] <- "Other"

# ---- NEW: helper to guarantee 'Other' exists and bars sum to exactly 1
ensure_other_present <- function(df, facet_var = "Dataset", rank = "Phylum", other_label = "Other") {
  df %>%
    dplyr::group_by(.data[[facet_var]], Factor) %>%
    dplyr::group_modify(~{
      block <- .x

      # Sum of taxa excluding 'Other'
      sum_known <- block %>%
        dplyr::filter(.data[[rank]] != other_label) %>%
        dplyr::summarise(s = sum(Mean_Relative_Abundance, na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
        dplyr::pull(s)
      if (length(sum_known) == 0) sum_known <- 0

      # Current 'Other' amount (0 if missing)
      other_amt <- block %>%
        dplyr::filter(.data[[rank]] == other_label) %>%
        dplyr::summarise(s = sum(Mean_Relative_Abundance, na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
        dplyr::pull(s)
      if (length(other_amt) == 0) other_amt <- 0

      residual <- 1 - (sum_known + other_amt)

      if (residual > 0) {
        if (other_amt > 0) {
          block <- block %>%
            dplyr::mutate(
              Mean_Relative_Abundance = dplyr::if_else(
                .data[[rank]] == other_label,
                Mean_Relative_Abundance + residual,
                Mean_Relative_Abundance
              )
            )
        } else {
          other_row <- block[1, , drop = FALSE]
          other_row[[rank]] <- other_label
          other_row$Mean_Relative_Abundance <- residual
          block <- dplyr::bind_rows(block, other_row)
        }
      }
      block
    }) %>%
    dplyr::ungroup()
}

# ---- Display-only helper to enforce a visible minimum height for 'Other' while keeping total = 1
force_other_min_display <- function(df,
                                    facet_var = "Dataset",
                                    rank = "Phylum",
                                    other_label = "Other",
                                    min_display = 0.0001) {
  df %>%
    dplyr::group_by(.data[[facet_var]], Factor) %>%
    dplyr::group_modify(~{
      block <- .x
      if (!any(block[[rank]] == other_label)) return(block)

      other_idx <- which(block[[rank]] == other_label)
      other_val <- block$Mean_Relative_Abundance[other_idx]
      if (length(other_val) == 0) other_val <- 0
      if (other_val > 0 && other_val < min_display) {
        deficit <- min_display - other_val
        non_other_idx <- setdiff(seq_len(nrow(block)), other_idx)
        non_other_sum <- sum(block$Mean_Relative_Abundance[non_other_idx], na.rm = TRUE)
        if (non_other_sum > 0) {
          scale_factor <- (non_other_sum - deficit) / non_other_sum
          block$Mean_Relative_Abundance[non_other_idx] <- block$Mean_Relative_Abundance[non_other_idx] * scale_factor
          block$Mean_Relative_Abundance[other_idx] <- min_display
        } else {
          block$Mean_Relative_Abundance[other_idx] <- 1
        }
      }
      block
    }) %>%
    dplyr::ungroup()
}

plot_combined_facets <- function(df,
                                 rank = "Phylum",
                                 facet_var = "Dataset",
                                 dataset_order = c("SOD Treatment", "Years Since SOD Treatment", "Chetco Bar Fire"),
                                 reference_level = "SOD-UT",
                                 collapse_other = FALSE,
                                 min_prop = 0.01,                 # ignored when collapse_other=FALSE
                                 other_label = "Other",
                                 ncol = 3,
                                 panel_labels = c("A", "B", "C"),
                                 show_ylab = TRUE,
                                 show_strip = TRUE,
                                 custom_taxa_order = NULL,
                                 legend_label = "Phylum",
                                 # ---- NEW: display-only control
                                 force_min_display_for_other = TRUE,
                                 min_display_for_other = 0.007) {

  # --- Normalize strings to avoid label mismatches that drop slices from legend/layers
  df[[rank]]     <- as.character(df[[rank]])
  df[[rank]]     <- trimws(df[[rank]])
  df$Factor <- factor(trimws(df$Factor), levels = levels(df$Factor))
  df[[facet_var]]<- trimws(as.character(df[[facet_var]]))
  df[[rank]][tolower(df[[rank]]) %in% c("other","others")] <- other_label

  df <- df %>%
    dplyr::group_by(.data[[facet_var]], Factor, .data[[rank]]) %>%
    dplyr::summarise(Mean_Relative_Abundance = sum(Mean_Relative_Abundance, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%
    dplyr::group_by(.data[[facet_var]], Factor) %>%
    dplyr::mutate(Mean_Relative_Abundance = Mean_Relative_Abundance / sum(Mean_Relative_Abundance, na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
    dplyr::ungroup() %>%
    dplyr::mutate(Mean_Relative_Abundance = pmax(0, pmin(1, Mean_Relative_Abundance)))

  # Ensure 'Other' exists and totals are exactly 1
  df <- ensure_other_present(df, facet_var = facet_var, rank = rank, other_label = other_label)

  if (collapse_other && min_prop > 0) {
    df <- df %>%
      dplyr::group_by(.data[[facet_var]], Factor) %>%
      dplyr::mutate(
        prop = Mean_Relative_Abundance,
        !!rank := dplyr::if_else(prop < min_prop, other_label, .data[[rank]])
      ) %>%
      dplyr::ungroup() %>%
      dplyr::group_by(.data[[facet_var]], Factor, .data[[rank]]) %>%
      dplyr::summarise(Mean_Relative_Abundance = sum(Mean_Relative_Abundance, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%
      dplyr::group_by(.data[[facet_var]], Factor) %>%
      dplyr::mutate(Mean_Relative_Abundance = Mean_Relative_Abundance / sum(Mean_Relative_Abundance, na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
      dplyr::ungroup()

    df <- ensure_other_present(df, facet_var = facet_var, rank = rank, other_label = other_label)
  }

  # Enforce a minimum visible height for 'Other' (display-only)
  if (force_min_display_for_other && min_display_for_other > 0) {
    df <- force_other_min_display(df, facet_var = facet_var, rank = rank,
                                  other_label = other_label, min_display = min_display_for_other)
  }

  df[[facet_var]] <- factor(df[[facet_var]], levels = dataset_order)

  if (!is.null(custom_taxa_order)) {
    ref_order_data <- custom_taxa_order[custom_taxa_order %in% unique(df[[rank]])]
    ref_order_data <- ref_order_data[ref_order_data != other_label]
  } else {
    ref_order_data <- df %>%
      dplyr::filter(Factor == reference_level, .data[[rank]] != other_label, Mean_Relative_Abundance > 0) %>%
      dplyr::group_by(.data[[rank]]) %>%
      dplyr::summarise(total = sum(Mean_Relative_Abundance), .groups = "drop") %>%
      dplyr::arrange(dplyr::desc(total)) %>%
      dplyr::pull(.data[[rank]])
    if (length(ref_order_data) == 0) {
      ref_order_data <- df %>%
        dplyr::filter(.data[[rank]] != other_label, Mean_Relative_Abundance > 0) %>%
        dplyr::group_by(.data[[rank]]) %>%
        dplyr::summarise(total = sum(Mean_Relative_Abundance), .groups = "drop") %>%
        dplyr::arrange(dplyr::desc(total)) %>%
        dplyr::pull(.data[[rank]])
    }
  }

  ref_order_data <- as.character(ref_order_data)

  legend_order <- unique(c(ref_order_data, other_label))
  legend_order <- as.character(legend_order)

  df[[rank]] <- factor(df[[rank]], levels = legend_order)

  n_taxa <- length(ref_order_data)
  n_colors_to_generate <- max(n_taxa, 10)
  if (n_taxa <= 10) {
    all_palette_colors <- viridisLite::viridis(n_colors_to_generate, option = "H", direction = -1)
  } else {
    base_colors  <- viridisLite::viridis(10, option = "H", direction = -1)
    extra_colors <- c("#83358F", "#D6B4FC", "#FF8DA1")
    n_extra_needed <- n_taxa - 10
    all_palette_colors <- c(base_colors, extra_colors[seq_len(n_extra_needed)])
  }
  palette_colors <- all_palette_colors[seq_len(length(ref_order_data))]
  names(palette_colors) <- ref_order_data
  palette_colors[other_label] <- "#6E6E6E"

  if (!is.factor(df$Factor)) {
    factor_levels <- df %>% dplyr::distinct(Factor) %>% dplyr::pull(Factor)
    df$Factor <- factor(df$Factor, levels = factor_levels)
  }

  ylab_text <- if (show_ylab) "Mean Relative Abundance (%)" else " "
  p <- ggplot2::ggplot(
    df,
    ggplot2::aes(x = Factor, y = Mean_Relative_Abundance, fill = .data[[rank]])
  ) +
    ggplot2::geom_col(
      color = "black", 
      linewidth = 0.1,
      width = 0.60, 
      position = ggplot2::position_stack(reverse = TRUE)
    ) +
    ggplot2::scale_fill_manual(values = palette_colors,
                               breaks = legend_order, limits = legend_order, drop = FALSE) +
    # Keep % ticks, but avoid top-edge clipping with a tiny headroom
    ggplot2::scale_y_continuous(
      labels = scales::percent_format(accuracy = 1),
      breaks = seq(0, 1, 0.25),
      expand = c(0, 0)
    ) +
    ggplot2::coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0, 1.01), clip = "off") +
    ggplot2::scale_x_discrete(drop = TRUE, expand = c(0.01, 0.005)) +
    ggplot2::labs(y = ylab_text, x = NULL, fill = legend_label)

  if (requireNamespace("ggh4x", quietly = TRUE)) {
    p <- p + ggh4x::facet_grid2(
      rows = ggplot2::vars(), cols = ggplot2::vars(!!rlang::sym(facet_var)),
      scales = "free_x", space = "free_x"
    )
  } else {
    p <- p + ggplot2::facet_grid(
      rows = ggplot2::vars(), cols = ggplot2::vars(!!rlang::sym(facet_var)),
      scales = "free_x", space = "free_x"
    )
  }

  p <- p +
    ggplot2::theme_minimal(base_size = 11) +
    ggplot2::theme(
      axis.text.x   = ggplot2::element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, vjust = 1, size = 10, margin = ggplot2::margin(t = 0)),
      axis.text.y   = ggplot2::element_text(size = 10),
      axis.title.y  = ggplot2::element_text(size = 12, face = "bold", margin = ggplot2::margin(r = 12)),
      axis.line.x   = ggplot2::element_line(color = "black", linewidth = 0.5),
      axis.line.y   = ggplot2::element_line(color = "black", linewidth = 0.5),
      axis.ticks.x  = ggplot2::element_line(color = "black", linewidth = 0.5),
      axis.ticks.y  = ggplot2::element_line(color = "black", linewidth = 0.5),
      axis.ticks.length.x = grid::unit(2, "pt"),
      legend.position     = "bottom",
      legend.text         = ggplot2::element_text(size = 8),
      legend.title        = ggplot2::element_text(size = 9, face = "bold"),
      legend.spacing.x    = grid::unit(0.1, "lines"),
      legend.spacing.y    = grid::unit(0.05, "lines"),
      legend.key.size     = grid::unit(0.35, "cm"),
      legend.box.margin   = ggplot2::margin(t = 2, r = 0, b = 0, l = 0),
      strip.text          = if (show_strip) ggplot2::element_text(size = 12, face = "bold", margin = ggplot2::margin(b = 4, t = 2)) else ggplot2::element_blank(),
      strip.background    = ggplot2::element_blank(),
      panel.spacing.x     = grid::unit(2.8, "lines"),
      panel.grid          = ggplot2::element_blank(),
      panel.border        = ggplot2::element_blank(),
      panel.background    = ggplot2::element_blank(),
      plot.background     = ggplot2::element_blank(),
      plot.margin         = ggplot2::margin(t = 3, r = 5, b = 3, l = 5)
    ) +
    ggplot2::guides(fill = ggplot2::guide_legend(ncol = 6, byrow = TRUE, reverse = FALSE))
  return(p)
}

all_16S_phyla    <- combined_16S   %>% dplyr::filter(Phylum != "Other") %>% dplyr::pull(Phylum) %>% unique()
all_ITS_phyla    <- combined_ITS   %>% dplyr::filter(Phylum != "Other") %>% dplyr::pull(Phylum) %>% unique()
all_rps10_genera <- combined_rps10 %>% dplyr::filter(Genus  != "Other") %>% dplyr::pull(Genus)  %>% unique()

taxa_order_16S_ref <- combined_16S %>%
  dplyr::filter(Factor == "SOD-UT", Phylum != "Other") %>%
  dplyr::group_by(Phylum) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(total = sum(Mean_Relative_Abundance), .groups = "drop") %>%
  dplyr::arrange(dplyr::desc(total)) %>%
  dplyr::pull(Phylum)

taxa_order_ITS_ref <- combined_ITS %>%
  dplyr::filter(Factor == "SOD-UT", Phylum != "Other") %>%
  dplyr::group_by(Phylum) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(total = sum(Mean_Relative_Abundance), .groups = "drop") %>%
  dplyr::arrange(dplyr::desc(total)) %>%
  dplyr::pull(Phylum)

taxa_order_RPS10_ref <- combined_rps10 %>%
  dplyr::filter(Factor == "SOD-UT", Genus != "Other") %>%
  dplyr::group_by(Genus) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(total = sum(Mean_Relative_Abundance), .groups = "drop") %>%
  dplyr::arrange(dplyr::desc(total)) %>%
  dplyr::pull(Genus)

taxa_order_16S   <- c(taxa_order_16S_ref,   setdiff(all_16S_phyla, taxa_order_16S_ref))
taxa_order_ITS   <- c(taxa_order_ITS_ref,   setdiff(all_ITS_phyla, taxa_order_ITS_ref))
taxa_order_RPS10 <- c(taxa_order_RPS10_ref, setdiff(all_rps10_genera, taxa_order_RPS10_ref))

p_16S <- plot_combined_facets(
  combined_16S, rank = "Phylum", reference_level = "SOD-UT",
  panel_labels = c("A", "B", "C"),
  min_prop = 0.01, show_ylab = FALSE, show_strip = TRUE,
  collapse_other = FALSE,
  custom_taxa_order = taxa_order_16S,
  legend_label = "Phylum"
)

p_ITS <- plot_combined_facets(
  combined_ITS, rank = "Phylum", reference_level = "SOD-UT",
  panel_labels = c("D", "E", "F"),
  min_prop = 0.01, show_ylab = TRUE, show_strip = FALSE,
  collapse_other = FALSE,
  custom_taxa_order = taxa_order_ITS,
  legend_label = "Phylum"
)

p_rps10 <- plot_combined_facets(
  combined_rps10, rank = "Genus", reference_level = "SOD-UT",
  panel_labels = c("G", "H", "I"),
  min_prop = 0.01, show_ylab = FALSE, show_strip = FALSE,
  collapse_other = FALSE,
  custom_taxa_order = taxa_order_RPS10,
  legend_label = "Genus"
)

add_panel_labels <- function(plot, labels, has_yaxis = FALSE) {
  g <- ggplotGrob(plot)
  panels <- grep("panel", g$layout$name)
  for (i in seq_along(panels)) {
    panel_pos <- g$layout[panels[i], ]
    if (i == 1) {
      if (has_yaxis) {
        x_pos <- unit(-44, "pt")
      } else {
        x_pos <- unit(-44, "pt")
      }
    } else {
      x_pos <- unit(-10, "pt")
    }
    label_grob <- textGrob(
      labels[i],
      x = x_pos,
      y = unit(1, "npc") - unit(-2, "pt"),
      just = c("left", "top"),
      gp = gpar(fontsize = 13, fontface = "bold")
    )
    g <- gtable_add_grob(g, label_grob,
                         t = panel_pos$t, l = panel_pos$l,
                         clip = "off",
                         name = paste0("panel-label-", i))
  }
  return(g)
}

p_16S_labeled  <- add_panel_labels(p_16S,  c("A", "B", "C"), has_yaxis = FALSE)
p_ITS_labeled  <- add_panel_labels(p_ITS,  c("D", "E", "F"), has_yaxis = TRUE)
p_rps10_labeled<- add_panel_labels(p_rps10,c("G", "H", "I"), has_yaxis = FALSE)

white_spacer <- function() {
  grid::rectGrob(gp = grid::gpar(fill = "white", col = NA))
}

final_plot <- cowplot::plot_grid(
  p_16S_labeled,
  white_spacer(),
  p_ITS_labeled,
  white_spacer(),
  p_rps10_labeled,
  ncol = 1,
  rel_heights = c(1.15, 0.08, 1.15, 0.08, 1.15)
)

ggsave("Figures/Figure3_Relabundance_faceted.pdf", final_plot, 
       width = 8.5, height = 11, dpi = 800, bg = "white")
ggsave("Figures/Figure3_Relabundance_faceted.png", final_plot, 
       width = 8.5, height = 11, dpi = 800, bg = "white")
ggsave("Figures/Figure3_Relabundance_faceted.svg", final_plot, 
       width = 8.5, height = 11, dpi = 800, bg = "white")

Save finalized tables with min abund > 0

write_nonzero <- function(result_obj, path, min_abund = 0) {
   result_obj$data %>%
    dplyr::filter(Mean_Relative_Abundance > min_abund) %>%
    readr::write_csv(path)
}
 
write_nonzero(result_RPS10_trt_species,"Results/RPS10/relabundance_table_RPS10_treatment_species_nowildfire_nonzero.csv")
write_nonzero(result_RPS10_trt_genus,"Results/RPS10/relabundance_table_RPS10_treatment_genus_nowildfire_nonzero.csv")

write_nonzero(result_RPS10_yrs_species,"Results/RPS10/relabundance_table_RPS10_YrSinceTrtBR_species_nowildfire_nonzero.csv")
write_nonzero(result_RPS10_yrs_genus,"Results/RPS10/relabundance_table_RPS10_YrSinceTrtBR_genus_nowildfire_nonzero.csv")

write_nonzero(result_RPS10_fire_species,"Results/RPS10/relabundance_table_RPS10_fire_species_nonzero.csv")
write_nonzero(result_RPS10_fire_genus,"Results/RPS10/relabundance_table_RPS10_fire_genus_nonzero.csv")

write_nonzero(result_ITS_trt_genus,"Results/ITS/relabundance_table_ITS_treatment_genus_nowildfire_nonzero.csv")
write_nonzero(result_ITS_trt,"Results/ITS/relabundance_table_ITS_treatment_phylum_nowildfire_nonzero.csv")

write_nonzero(result_ITS_yrs_genus,"Results/ITS/relabundance_table_ITS_YrSinceTrtBR_genus_nonzero.csv")
write_nonzero(result_ITS_yrs,"Results/ITS/relabundance_table_ITS_YrSinceTrtBR_phylum_nowildfire_nonzero.csv")

write_nonzero(result_ITS_fire_genus,"Results/ITS/relabundance_table_ITS_fire_genus_nowildfire_nonzero.csv")
write_nonzero(result_ITS_fire,"Results/ITS/relabundance_table_ITS_fire_phylum_nowildfire_nonzero.csv")

write_nonzero(result_16S_trt_genus,"Results/16S/relabundance_table_16S_treatment_genus_nowildfire_nonzero.csv")
write_nonzero(result_16S_trt,"Results/16S/relabundance_table_16S_treatment_phylum_nowildfire_nonzero.csv")

write_nonzero(result_16S_yrs_genus,"Results/16S/relabundance_table_16S_YrSinceTrtBR_genus_nonzero.csv")
write_nonzero(result_16S_yrs,"Results/16S/relabundance_table_16S_YrSinceTrtBR_phylum_nowildfire_nonzero.csv")

write_nonzero(result_16S_fire_genus,"Results/16S/relabundance_table_16S_fire_genus_nowildfire_nonzero.csv")
write_nonzero(result_16S_fire,"Results/16S/relabundance_table_16S_fire_phylum_nowildfire_nonzero.csv")
